name: revit_calculate_material_quantities
description: Calculates net and gross material volumes and areas for walls, floors, and roofs in the active document.

categories.description: Element categories to include; defaults to all three

include_gross.description: When true, compute gross quantities by temporarily removing cutting elements

output_path.description: Optional file path for CSV export instead of the default text file

notes: MaterialQuantityCalculator.ReportResults defines the return shape; gross pass uses a rolled-back delete transaction.
